reviews.review_description:
I don't write reviews Often,.  When it do, it means eather the experience was a pile of crap. Or it was amazing.   In this Case.   It's AMAZING.

HOWEVER....    I Would love to play with a gamepad instead. (Broken back, so stuck in a bed, can barely move) Which does not seem to work . Accelerating DOES work using a gamepad. But no way to steer.

Other than that.     5/5.
Very fun...I wish they could work sine kind of story around it give it some purpose but other than that great game.
Loads of fun.

The vehicles go very very fast, so this game isn't for everyone, but this is an amazing game. I can't help but try to beat the latest scores on the leaderboards. There's a lot of gameplay to be had, with the different difficulties, stages and vehicles. It's the one of first game I've played on Oculus Go that feels like a complete polished experience that I could put 100+ hours into.
Great visuals, very immersive. Well worth the money!

reviews.review_title: It’s like F-Zero and Tron had a baby!
reviews.review_description: I’m totally geeking out on this game. The simple and responsive controls make it easy to pick up and play, while the higher difficulty options provide a fun challenge - and great incentive to replay in order to earn all gold medals.
The game is near perfect, it needs multiplayer that's certain. If I were to nitpick I'd say the sound effects could be better, but that doesn't take much away from it. 5 stars

developer_response.body: For anyone reading this comment. The game now does have multiplayer! :)

reviews.review_description: And I got A SALE WHEN MULTI PLAYER CAME

reviews.review_title: One of the best Racing games
reviews.review_description: I love this game on the Oculus go if such a cool f zero type-racer. It makes great use of The limited controls that are there on the Oculus Go controller. I really hope this game gets a remake on the Oculus Quest. Because it's one of the best games on the Go and I know it would thrive have on the quest.

reviews.review_title: I never get tired of this game
reviews.review_description: You guys out did yourself this time my heroes!

This is what VR is all about. For maximum experience, DON'T wear the helmet.  Why leave a negative comment, just  because it actually gives you the same feeling you'd get riding a motorbike at high speed? Those people need Artificial Reality glasses. Luckily, those players still can play, by using the helmet.

Wasn't sure how fast this game would be and wow was I wrong it's superb great vr immersive graphics and gameplay great to use oculus controller and pick up and play but does get harder as u go through levels this game is a keeper you can see the developers have put a lot of hours into making this game many thanks
FZero(-X) style Racing at highspeeeed...Hahaha inVR!! Hoped to find something that comes close to that and i'm super happy now!

Lots of the go titles rely on good graphics and the immersive feel but fall down on gameplay. This has the graphics, immersion and old-school high quality gameplay. I play it all the time, it's great. Hoping the sequel (hope there is one!) will have multiplayer and more racers at a time, maybe 8 or so.
Sweet!!!!!

reviews.review_title: Simply amazing what they did for the Go!
reviews.review_description:
It is what a good racing game should be, lots of turns, very responsive, you feel like you are going hundreds of miles an hour.    I love the challenges 

Great work, well worth the money.. I run at least 2-3 laps a day and it's one of my 2 goto games when introducing the Go to people.
Void Racer gives me the sense of speed that I haven't been able to find in other racing games, and it's so smooth I love it.

This was my first racing game, and I've really enjoyed it. The controller controls are good (thanks so much for rotation control and the 'brake' sound feedback), it loads fast, it reacts without lag, and it doesn't make me dizzy. I removed the helmet for full view after one race and I'm not going back. Also love the void aspect that slows you down but not for too long. I've been playing Mario Kart and F-zero since '92, Wipeout since ps1 and now I feel I can play a mix of these in VR.

Please expand the game with more tracks / players..
Simple, fun, addictive. I'd recommend this as a good first game for VR
Good game but make sure your head can handle it.
